name: Chocolate Chip Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cinnamon, walnuts, chocolate chips, and white sugar; set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, blend eggs, sour cream, brown sugar, and salad oil until creamy. Add vanilla.
3. In another bowl, combine cracker crumbs, baking powder, and baking soda. Stir into the batter.
4. Pour half of the batter into an oiled 13x9 inch baking pan. Sprinkle with half of the cinnamon/sugar mixture.
5. Pour the remaining batter into the pan. Sprinkle the top with the remaining cinnamon/sugar mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
